questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if OpenAI and Ona are close competitors in the supply of AI tools for software development and there are not many alternatives, or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with OpenAI and/or Ona.
